utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested: Each section requires coverage type with costs. The plan provides for: health_coverage (details and cost), property_coverage (details and cost), travel_coverage (details and cost), additional_services (details and cost), and total_budget (monthly and annual breakdown). All required items are present with costs and some details; the total budget includes both monthly and annual totals.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific plan names: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings. LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage (physical_health) with rating 9. PrimeHome Premium Coverage appears under property_protection (home_content) with rating 3. InsurePlus Standard Plan appears under both primary_health_coverage (physical_health) and mobility_coverage (travel_insurance). Given the final plan lists it under travel_coverage, I used the travel_insurance rating, which is 10.
